title: Xtra Malty Turkish Noodles Pide
description: A light and malty Turkish dish featuring rice stick noodles, perfect for midnight cravings, made without onion or garlic. This pide is a delicious and satisfying snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a mortar, pound the cooked noodles with a pestle until they are slightly crushed.
In a large bowl, whisk together the malt syrup, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the crushed noodles, turkish cheese, and eggs to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a pide dish or a small baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Shape the mixture into a pide shape, making a small indentation in the center.
Bake the pide in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until it is golden brown.
Remove the pide from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Let the pide cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
